title: Service Fidelity & Mechanical Enforcement Hardening Report

findings.title: artifact-exists validator path resolution
findings.description: artifact-exists validator reports committed files as missing during complete validation
findings.impact: Blocks completion of nodes even when artifacts exist and are in git
findings.remediation: Fix path resolution in validator harness (deferred to iter3)

findings.title: Claims.json automatic migration
findings.description: Claims.json is automatically migrated after complete/commit commands
findings.impact: State file availability unclear after operations
findings.remediation: Document migration behavior and add mechanical enforcement of state lifecycle

findings.title: Large DAG performance not tested at scale
findings.description: Optimization modules implemented but not tested with > 1000 nodes
findings.remediation: Add performance profiling to iter3 testing phase

findings.title: Import resolution consistency
findings.impact: Builds may fail with incorrect import extensions
findings.remediation: Standardize all imports to .ts and document ESM module resolution

batch_2_mechanical_validators.coverage: artifact validation, error recovery, state enforcement, concurrency

batch_3_fidelity_hardening.coverage: SLO validation, concurrent stress testing, large DAG optimization

batch_4_integration.coverage: end-to-end validation, CLI integration, full pipeline testing

next_steps: Fix artifact-exists validator path resolution bug (iter3)
Add automated enforcement of state lifecycle (iter3)
